_comment: Baseline eval config for SmolVLA on LIBERO-Goal. These are the parameters the Colab notebook and any eval wrapper read. Flag names are reconciled against the official LeRobot v0.5 docs; ALWAYS re-confirm against `lerobot-eval --help` on the installed version (see scripts/reconcile_flags.sh -> docs/flags.md).

eval._note: 10 episodes/task x 10 tasks = official protocol. batch_size raised for wall-time; n_episodes 50 is optional precision but ~14h on T4.

_n_action_steps_note: CONFIRMED required for smolvla speed (2026-06-09): pass --policy.n_action_steps=10. Without it ~400s/episode; with it ~100s/episode.

rename_map._status: CONFIRMED_NOT_NEEDED (2026-06-09 Colab run, eval ran clean with no --rename_map)
rename_map._note: HuggingFaceVLA/* LIBERO data + the lerobot libero env already use observation.images.image / image2, matching the policy. Syntax if ever needed: --rename_map='{"observation.images.OLD":"observation.images.NEW"}'

expected_results.note: Report the observed number as-is. Do NOT chase the paper's 92%. 0% success => check control_mode (relative vs absolute) and rename_map (image keys).
